articles.title: The automation illusion: Why AI is making COOs' jobs harder, not easier
articles.description: The executives responsible for keeping the world's biggest companies running thought AI would simplify their jobs. They were wrong.
articles.content:
What they described instead, during a lunch roundtable hosted by Thomson Reuters, was something closer to organized chaos.
